zh.St Mary Aldermary, London, England: 英國英格蘭倫敦聖 瑪麗 阿爾德馬利 煙雨 聖 多馬 馮 阿波斯特爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan Bryce於1454年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Henry Bryce29歲，母親Alice de Radcliffe24歲。她於1473年與Henry Keeble Sheriff of London在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1482年在她的家鄉享年28歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.St Mary Aldermary, London, England: 英国英格兰倫敦聖 瑪麗 阿爾德馬利 煙雨 聖 多馬 馮 阿波斯特爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joan Bryce于1454年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲Henry Bryce29岁，母亲Alice de Radcliffe24岁。她于1473年与Henry Keeble Sheriff of London在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1482年在她的家乡享年28岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Bryce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Brice, probably Celtic (Gaulish) in origin but not firmly explained, which was Latinized as Bricius. It became popular in France through the cult of the 5th-century Saint Brice, successor of Saint Martin as Bishop of Tours, and was introduced to England and Scotland by the Normans. See also Bryson .

variants.name: Bryson
meanings: Scottish: patronymic from the personal name Brice + -son (see Brice and Bryce ).

Irish (Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Briosáin, a form of Ó Muirgheasáin (see Morrissey ), altered by association with the Scottish surname Bryson, especially in Derry. Bryson was also used for Breslin in Donegal.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan Bryce was born in 1454, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Henry Bryce, was 29 and her mother, Alice de Radcliffe, was 24. She married Henry Keeble Sheriff of London in 1473, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1482, in her hometown, at the age of 28, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan Bryce est née en 1454, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Henry Bryce, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alice de Radcliffe, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Keeble Sheriff of London en 1473, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1482, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.St Mary Aldermary, London, England: St Mary Aldermary with St Thomas the Apostle, London, England, United Kingdom

Sie hat 1473 in London, Middlesex, England Henry Keeble Sheriff of London geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1482 im Alter von 28 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

ko.St Mary Aldermary, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 메리 알더마이 위스 스트 톰아스 테 아포스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Bryce(이)가 1454년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Bryce(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Radcliffe(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1473년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Henry Keeble Sheriff of London(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1482년 그녀의 고향에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Henry Keeble Sheriff of London em 1473, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.St Mary Aldermary, London, England: ст мэри алдирмэри вит ст томас т апостл, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan Bryce родилась в 1454 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Bryce было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Radcliffe, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Keeble Sheriff of London в 1473 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1482 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 28 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.
